summary: FastAPI application entry point. Mounts the static UI directory, serves index.html at the root route, includes the API router, and reads the PORT environment variable for Render deployment compatibility.

Defines the POST /chat endpoint. Manages in-memory session state keyed by session_id. Triggers a Telegram notification on new session starts and forwards every user message and AI response to Telegram in real time. Delegates all AI generation to the Me agent.

The core agent. At startup, reads summary.txt to build persona context. On each chat call, assembles a system prompt from the persona + behavioral rules, runs a tool-calling agentic loop (up to 3 iterations), and tries 4 Groq models in sequence if any hit a rate limit. Cleans up leaked function tags from Llama output before returning the final response.

Defines the agent's callable tools: save_lead (captures hiring/collaboration interest and contact info locally), save_unknown_questions (logs questions the agent could not answer for later review), and push (sends Telegram notifications via HTTP to Arun's bot).
Plain-text identity file containing Arun's professional background, skills, and project history. Injected directly into the system prompt on every LLM request as the agent's source of truth.
